name: Devilled Cheese Fondue
recipeIngredient: Cubes of ham and toasted granary bread, to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the inside of the fondue pot with the cut clove of garlic.
2. Add milk and heat until bubbling.
3. Toss cheese in flour, then add to the pot.
4. Stir constantly over a low heat until melted and the mixture is thick and smooth.
5. Stir in mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and horseradish relish.
6. Serve with cubes of ham and cubes of toasted granary bread.
(Serves 4-6)
